Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "TANKS-RADARSOFT-0410-190D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0410 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Tanks (Radarsoft).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0410 to set $BA = $01 and $0341 = $1D to allow the game to run.
